rationale: Educ. Code §31.0711 governs copyright licensing for open education resource instructional materials. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions or appraised value thresholds under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Open education resource instructional material made available under this subchapter may include content not owned by the state and for which preexisting rights may exist if the content:
_note: No conflict. The cited rule addresses OER copyright/licensing; the proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption amounts. No overlap in subject matter.
